title: Dheeran Adhyayam Onnu
desc: A police officer is assigned the task of solving the mystery behind a series of murders. Upon thoroughly investigating, he discovers a common thread that binds all the murders together.

title: Kumki
desc: Bomman, a mahout, and his elephant are assigned to protect the crops of a hill tribe from a rogue elephant. However, his life takes a turn when he falls in love with the village leader's daughter.

title: Thuppakki
desc: An army officer sets out to save the people of his country when he learns that an entire network of terrorists are operating in the city and are planning to carry out multiple terror attacks.

title: Hitler
desc: Selva's move to Chennai for work leads to unexpected involvement in crime. As the city falls into disarray, a dishonest politician manoeuvres for control.

title: Ee Pattanathil Bhootham
desc: An evil magician releases a friendly spirit and orders him to make money through crime. However, the spirit falls into the hands of circus children after the sorcerer loses him in an accident.
